# Trellix Edr Tools

## Overview

gSage AI тАФ Trellix EDR host quarantine status tool.

## Tools in this group

| Tool | Summary | Permissions | Requires approval | Core |
| --- | --- | --- | :---: | :---: |
| `trellix_edr_get_host_quarantine_status` | Look up Trellix EDR hosts by hostname/IP and return their quarantine and metadata status | `edr:read` | тАФ | тАФ |
| `trellix_edr_quarantine_host` | Quarantine or release a host on Trellix EDR by hostname/IP (requires approval) | `edr:write`, `edr:quarantine` | тЬУ | тАФ |
| `trellix_edr_search` | Hunt across endpoints with Trellix EDR realtime searches (SQL-like v2 or structured v1) | `edr:read` | тАФ | тАФ |
| `trellix_edr_search_bulk_files` | Bulk file hunt across Trellix EDR endpoints by a LIST of hashes or file-name substrings (single OR-combined search) | `edr:read` | тАФ | тАФ |
| `trellix_edr_search_bulk_network` | Bulk network flow hunt across Trellix EDR endpoints by a LIST of remote IPs or process-name substrings (single OR-combined search) | `edr:read` | тАФ | тАФ |
| `trellix_edr_search_files` | Search files across Trellix EDR endpoints by name and/or hash (MD5/SHA1/SHA256 auto-detected by length) | `edr:read` | тАФ | тАФ |
| `trellix_edr_search_network` | Search network flows on Trellix EDR endpoints by remote IP/port, process name or hostname | `edr:read` | тАФ | тАФ |
| `trellix_edr_search_processes` | Hunt processes across Trellix EDR endpoints (Processes / ProcessHistory) тАФ fleet-wide aggregation by default. | `edr:read` | тАФ | тАФ |

## Configuration

> The JSON below goes into the **configtool model** in the web UI (per organisation; can also be scoped to a department).

> **Multiple profiles supported** тАФ you may create more than one config row per organisation, each with a distinct `profile_id`. The agent picks one via the `config_profile` parameter at call time. State, rate limits and circuit-breaker counters are isolated per profile.

> **Sensitive fields** (api keys / passwords / tokens) are *omitted* from the JSON below тАФ set them via environment variables (see the _Environment variables_ table) or directly in the encrypted DB row from the web UI.

### Empty configtool template (required fields only)

```json
{
  "client_id": "<value>",
  "client_secret": "<value>",
  "x_api_key": "<value>"
}
```

### Example configtool model

```json
{
  "base_url_v2": "https://api.manage.trellix.com",
  "client_id": "<value>",
  "client_secret": "<value>",
  "region": "us-east-1",
  "timeout": 60,
  "token_url": "https://auth.trellix.com/auth/realms/IAM/protocol/openid-connect/token",
  "verify_tls": true,
  "x_api_key": "<value>"
}
```

### Field reference

| Field | Type | Required | Sensitive | Default | Description |
| --- | --- | :---: | :---: | --- | --- |
| `base_url_v2` | `string` | тАФ | тАФ | `"https://api.manage.trellix.com"` | Override the v2 base URL.  Default: https://api.manage.trellix.com. |
| `client_id` | `string` | тЬУ | тАФ | тАФ | Trellix OAuth2 client_id (issued in the Trellix console under Settings тЖТ API Access). |
| `client_secret` | `string` | тЬУ | тЬУ | тАФ | Trellix OAuth2 client_secret. |
| `region` | `string` | тАФ | тАФ | `"us-east-1"` | Trellix SOC region tag, used to build the v1 (Active Response) host: api.soc.<region>.trellix.com.  Default: 'us-east-1'. |
| `timeout` | `integer` | тАФ | тАФ | `60` | HTTP request timeout in seconds (default: 60). |
| `token_url` | `string` | тАФ | тАФ | `"https://auth.trellix.com/auth/realms/IAM/protocol/openid-connect/token"` | Override the OAuth2 token endpoint.  Default: https://auth.trellix.com/auth/realms/IAM/protocol/openid-connect/token. |
| `verify_tls` | `boolean` | тАФ | тАФ | `true` | Verify TLS certificates (default: true). |
| `x_api_key` | `string` | тЬУ | тЬУ | тАФ | Trellix x-api-key header value (issued together with the OAuth2 credentials). |

## Environment variables

The variables below are derived automatically from each tool's `config_schema`. Set them in your `.env` (or via your secrets backend) to seed defaults for every organisation. **Per-org DB config takes precedence over env vars.**

| Variable | Maps to field | Type | Default | Sensitive | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | :---: | --- |
| `TOOL_TRELLIX_EDR__BASE_URL_V2` | `base_url_v2` | `string` | `"https://api.manage.trellix.com"` | тАФ | Override the v2 base URL.  Default: https://api.manage.trellix.com. |
| `TOOL_TRELLIX_EDR__CLIENT_ID` | `client_id` | `string` | тАФ | тАФ | Trellix OAuth2 client_id (issued in the Trellix console under Settings тЖТ API Access). |
| `TOOL_TRELLIX_EDR__CLIENT_SECRET` | `client_secret` | `string` | тАФ | тЬУ | Trellix OAuth2 client_secret. |
| `TOOL_TRELLIX_EDR__REGION` | `region` | `string` | `"us-east-1"` | тАФ | Trellix SOC region tag, used to build the v1 (Active Response) host: api.soc.<region>.trellix.com.  Default: 'us-east-1'. |
| `TOOL_TRELLIX_EDR__TIMEOUT` | `timeout` | `integer` | `60` | тАФ | HTTP request timeout in seconds (default: 60). |
| `TOOL_TRELLIX_EDR__TOKEN_URL` | `token_url` | `string` | `"https://auth.trellix.com/auth/realms/IAM/protocol/openid-connect/token"` | тАФ | Override the OAuth2 token endpoint.  Default: https://auth.trellix.com/auth/realms/IAM/protocol/openid-connect/token. |
| `TOOL_TRELLIX_EDR__VERIFY_TLS` | `verify_tls` | `boolean` | `true` | тАФ | Verify TLS certificates (default: true). |
| `TOOL_TRELLIX_EDR__X_API_KEY` | `x_api_key` | `string` | тАФ | тЬУ | Trellix x-api-key header value (issued together with the OAuth2 credentials). |
| `TOOL_TRELLIX_EDR_QUARANTINE_HOST__AUTO_APPROVE` | `auto_approve` | `boolean` | `false` | тАФ | When true, HITL approval requests for this tool are auto-approved by the backend without human review. Useful for lab/dev environments. DB toolconfig overrides env TOOL_<NAME>__AUTO_APPROVE; default is false. |

_Note: any field above can also be overridden per-tool by using the prefix `TOOL_<TOOL_NAME>__` instead of the shared `TOOL_<NAMESPACE>__` тАФ useful when a single tool in the family needs a distinct value._
